rulings.Case Title: REGINA A FINULIAR VS. BAC HOME LOANS SERVICING, LP, A SUBSIDIARY OF
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 31, 2012, line 1 - DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege tolling and posting of amount of tender with court required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET D. FOSTER et al VS. JOHN F. BRITTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 31, 2012, line 2 - CROSS DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION's AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege facts showing regulation 6.15C(3) is not reasonably necessary to effectuate the purpose of the San Francisco Rent Ordinance and that it is arbitrary, capricious or without reasonable or rational basis. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAJED M MASSIS et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK LTD et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 31, 2012, line 3 - Defendants' AMERICA'S SERVICING CO AND WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S Demurrer To Complaint. Sustain with leave to amend to address all issues raised in demurrer (no opposition filed). Prevailing party prepare order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ENRIQUE PEDROZA et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 31, 2012, line 4 - DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP and STANFORD APARTMENTS HOLDINGS, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Deny striking punitive and attorney fees. Grant striking roes. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ENRIQUE PEDROZA et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 31, 2012, line 4 - DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP and STANFORD APARTMENTS HOLDINGS, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule - 3rd, 4th, 8th and 9th causes of action. Sustain with leave to amend 5th, 6th and 7th causes of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN VASEY VS. JEREMY T WHEAT et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 31, 2012, line 5 - DEFENDANT JEREMY WHEAT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule - 5 days to answer. =(501/REQ)
